1в†’package search
     2в†’
     3в†’import "sort"
     4в†’
     5в†’// Registry holds every registered search field, keyed by name.
     6в†’type Registry struct {
     7в†’	fields map[string]Field
     8в†’}
     9в†’
    10в†’// Lookup returns the Field for the given name, or false if unknown.
    11в†’func (r *Registry) Lookup(name string) (Field, bool) {
    12в†’	f, ok := r.fields[name]
    13в†’	return f, ok
    14в†’}
    15в†’
    16в†’// All returns every registered field in an unspecified order.
    17в†’func (r *Registry) All() []Field {
    18в†’	out := make([]Field, 0, len(r.fields))
    19в†’	for _, f := range r.fields {
    20в†’		out = append(out, f)
    21в†’	}
    22в†’	return out
    23в†’}
    24в†’
    25в†’// Descriptors returns metadata for every registered field. This is the
    26в†’// contract consumed by the future GET /api/search/fields handler.
    27в†’func (r *Registry) Descriptors() []FieldDescriptor {
    28в†’	out := make([]FieldDescriptor, 0, len(r.fields))
    29в†’	for _, f := range r.fields {
    30в†’		out = append(out, f.Descriptor())
    31в†’	}
    32в†’	return out
    33в†’}
    34в†’
    35в†’// OutputDescriptors returns metadata for fields that appear in search result
    36в†’// columns (OutputDefault != nil). The caller decides how to order them.
    37в†’func (r *Registry) OutputDescriptors() []FieldDescriptor {
    38в†’	out := make([]FieldDescriptor, 0, len(r.fields))
    39в†’	for _, f := range r.fields {
    40в†’		d := f.Descriptor()
    41в†’		if d.OutputDefault != nil {
    42в†’			out = append(out, d)
    43в†’		}
    44в†’	}
    45в†’	return out
    46в†’}
    47в†’
    48в†’// ExportableDescriptors returns metadata for fields that are exportable and
    49в†’// have an output representation. Results are ordered by theme (AllThemes order)
    50в†’// then by registration order within each theme.
    51в†’func (r *Registry) ExportableDescriptors() []FieldDescriptor {
    52в†’	// Build theme-index map for sorting.
    53в†’	themeIndex := make(map[Theme]int, len(AllThemes))
    54в†’	for i, t := range AllThemes {
    55в†’		themeIndex[t] = i
    56в†’	}
    57в†’
    58в†’	// Collect qualifying fields preserving registration order.
    59в†’	type indexedDesc struct {
    60в†’		regOrder int
    61в†’		desc     FieldDescriptor
    62в†’	}
    63в†’	var items []indexedDesc
    64в†’	for i, f := range allFields() {
    65в†’		d := f.Descriptor()
    66в†’		if d.Exportable != nil && *d.Exportable && d.OutputDefault != nil {
    67в†’			items = append(items, indexedDesc{regOrder: i, desc: d})
    68в†’		}
    69в†’	}
    70в†’
    71в†’	// Sort by theme order, stable within theme (registration order).
    72в†’	sort.SliceStable(items, func(i, j int) bool {
    73в†’		ti := themeIndex[items[i].desc.Theme]
    74в†’		tj := themeIndex[items[j].desc.Theme]
    75в†’		if ti != tj {
    76в†’			return ti < tj
    77в†’		}
    78в†’		return items[i].regOrder < items[j].regOrder
    79в†’	})
    80в†’
    81в†’	out := make([]FieldDescriptor, len(items))
    82в†’	for i, item := range items {
    83в†’		out[i] = item.desc
    84в†’	}
    85в†’	return out
    86в†’}
    87в†’
    88в†’// NewRegistry constructs and returns a fully populated Registry.
    89в†’func NewRegistry() *Registry {
    90в†’	r := &Registry{fields: make(map[string]Field)}
    91в†’	for _, f := range allFields() {
    92в†’		r.fields[f.Name()] = f
    93в†’	}
    94в†’	return r
    95в†’}

   184в†’// FieldDescriptor is the metadata-export contract used by the future handler.

   277в†’// resolvedOutputKey returns the explicit outputKey if set, otherwise derives
   278в†’// from the field source.
   279в†’func (b baseField) resolvedOutputKey() string {
   280в†’	if b.outputKey != "" {
   281в†’		return b.outputKey
   282в†’	}
   283в†’	return outputKeyFromSource(b.source)

   286в†’// outputKeyFromSource derives the output key for extracting a field's value
   287в†’// from the data JSONB blob. Returns empty string for non-extractable sources.
   288в†’func outputKeyFromSource(src FieldSource) string {
   289в†’	switch src.Kind {
   290в†’	case SourceJSONBPath:
   291в†’		return strings.Join(src.JSONBPath, ".")
   292в†’	case SourceColumn:
   293в†’		return src.Column
   294в†’	default:
   295в†’		return ""
   296в†’	}
   297в†’}

   303в†’// jsonbNullGuard returns "ref IS NOT NULL AND " when the source is a JSONB path.
   304в†’// For non-JSONB sources it returns "".
   305в†’func jsonbNullGuard(src FieldSource) string {
   306в†’	if src.Kind == SourceJSONBPath {
   307в†’		return src.SQLRef() + " IS NOT NULL AND "
   308в†’	}
   309в†’	return ""
   310в†’}

   432в†’func (f *NumericRangeField) BuildSQL(rawFilter json.RawMessage, argStart int) (string, []any, error) {
   433в†’	var filter NumericRangeFilter

   444в†’	castRef := f.source.SQLRefAs(castType)
   445в†’	guard := ""

   476в†’func (f *RankingField) BuildSQL(rawFilter json.RawMessage, argStart int) (string, []any, error) {
   477в†’	var filter NumericRangeFilter
   478в†’	if err := json.Unmarshal(rawFilter, &filter); err != nil {
   479в†’		return "", nil, err
   480в†’	}
   481в†’	if filter.Min == nil && filter.Max == nil {
   482в†’		return "", nil, fmt.Errorf("at least one of min or max is required")

   485в†’	datakey := f.source.JSONBPath[0]

   489в†’	nullGuard := fmt.Sprintf("(%s) IS NOT NULL", ref)

   504в†’		args = []any{*filter.Max}

   532в†’func (f *GeoField) BuildSQL(rawFilter json.RawMessage, argStart int) (string, []any, error) {
   533в†’	var filter GeoFilterInput
   534в†’	if err := json.Unmarshal(rawFilter, &filter); err != nil {

   537в†’	col := f.source.Column

   539в†’	case GeoFilterKindRadius:

   561в†’	default:

   563в†’	}
   564в†’}

### 2. **field.go** - Field Type System
